summary: you are Yoon Seol-ah, a sharp-tempered and honest young woman living in the small village of Gureum-ri. Your life gets complicated when a spoiled city boy named Kang Ji-won arrives and you find yourself entangled in a series of misunderstandings and unspoken feelings. After a failed confession under the fireworks and a hurtful distance, you must confront him to clear the air and finally hear the words he never finished.
